---
title: "letter_demo"
format:
  letter-pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
date: last-modified
mainfont: Aptos
mainfontoptions: 
  - Path = C:/Users/zhuzh/AppData/Local/Microsoft/Windows/Fonts/
  - Extension = .ttf
  - BoldFont = Aptos-Bold
  - ItalicFont = Aptos-Italic
  - BoldItalicFont = Aptos-Bold-Italic
fontsize: 11pt
lang: en
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
params:
  prefix: Mr.
  first_name: James
  last_name: Smith
  organisation: University of Basel
  address: Petersplatz 1, P. O. Box
  zip: 4001
  city: Basel
sender:
  first_name: Anna
  last_name: Muster
  email: anna.muster@swisstph.ch
  phone: +41 79 xxx xx xx
---

<!--
================================================================================
GUIDE TO THE YAML HEADER ABOVE  (this block is a comment; it does NOT render)
================================================================================

SAFE TO CUSTOMISE — change these freely:

  title:        Document title metadata. Not shown on the letter body. Any text.

  date:         "last-modified" auto-fills from the file's mtime. Can be a
                fixed date or removed. (Note the letter body also prints a date
                via R: format(Sys.Date(), "%d.%m.%Y").)

  fontsize:     Base text size (e.g. 11pt, 12pt).
  lang:         Document language for hyphenation (e.g. en, de, fr).

  params:       RECIPIENT details (prefix, first_name, last_name, organisation,
                address, zip, city). Edit the VALUES freely. These are printed
                in the letter body via `r params$first_name` etc. — if you
                RENAME a key here you must update the matching body reference.

  sender:       SENDER details (first_name, last_name, email, phone). Edit the
                VALUES freely. Printed in the body via the
                {{< meta sender.first_name >}} shortcodes — RENAME a key here
                and you must update the matching shortcode in the body.

CHANGE ONLY IF YOU KNOW WHAT YOU ARE DOING — these can break rendering:

  format: letter-pdf
                The Swiss TPH letter extension (lives in _extensions/letter/).
                Supplies letterhead, colours (swisstphindigo), and layout.
                Do NOT rename, move, or delete _extensions/.

  pdf-engine: xelatex
                Required so the custom system font (below) works. Switching to
                pdflatex breaks system-font support — leave as xelatex (or
                lualatex).

  mainfont: Aptos  +  mainfontoptions:
                >>> MACHINE-SPECIFIC <<< The Path = C:/Users/zhuzh/AppData/...
                points to ONE user's font folder. On another computer this
                path will not exist and the render fails. To fix on your
                machine: update Path to your own font directory, OR delete the
                mainfont + mainfontoptions block to fall back to the default
                font.

  execute: { echo: false, warning: false }
                Hides R code and warnings. echo: true dumps R source into the
                letter body.
================================================================================
-->

```{r}
# Put a R chunk here even if you don't need it
# to make sure the rendering works well
```

\placetextbox{18mm}{20mm}{l}{
\textcolor{gray}{\textbf{\nothing{}{{< meta sender.first_name >}} {{< meta sender.last_name >}}}}\\
\textcolor{gray}{\nothing{}{{< meta sender.email >}}}\\
\textcolor{gray}{Mobile {{< meta sender.phone >}}}
}



`r params$prefix` `r params$first_name` `r params$last_name`

`r params$organisation`

`r params$address`

`r params$zip` `r params$city`

`r params$city`, `{r} format(Sys.Date(), "%d.%m.%Y")`

\vspace{2cm}

\begin{large}
\textcolor{swisstphindigo}{\textbf{Subject}}
\end{large}

Dear `r params$prefix` `r params$last_name`,

```{r}
set.seed(123)
lorem::ipsum(1, avg_words_per_sentence = 15)
lorem::ipsum(1)
```

Kind regards,

![](./images/signature.png){fig-align="left" width="15%"}

{{< meta sender.first_name >}} {{< meta sender.last_name >}}

*job title*

*Unit*

*Department*
